posts.body:

Ran command: `npm.cmd run dev`
Browser task: "UI & Logic Features E2E Testing"

I attempted to run an automated visual end-to-end test on the platform, but my internal automated test browser encountered a terminal failure (`target closed: could not read protocol padding: EOF`) when attempting to launch `h

This is a known issue with my internal browser container which is out of my control. I must ask you how you would like to proceed. 

However, I have fully restarted both your backend and your Vite development server, meaning the platform is live right now! You can navigate to `** directly on your own browser.

Take a look around — check the **Reels** tab, click `+` to open the Reel upload flow, test the **YOUR MEDIA** and **YOUR POSTS** tabs, and check your **Admin Dashboard**. Let me know how it feels or if you need any further logic adjustments!
